UpdateAppBlbIpGroup.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters
UpdateAppBlbIpGroup.ipGroupId: ID of the IP group to update
UpdateAppBlbIpGroup.name: Name of the IP group for easy identification. 1–65 bytes, must start with a letter, may contain letters, digits, -, /, . and _
UpdateAppBlbIpGroup.desc: Description of the IP group, up to 200 characters
